children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: Expected status code 204, but got 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization/17257739-1a34-47b9-b7f7-7c734e71cd46', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
assert 404 == 204
 +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
 +    where <Response [404]> = <utilities.context.ScenarioContext object at 0x7fcbaa972890>.response
Verify that the POST Create API request with minimal dataset for different vaccine types

AssertionError: 
 Expected status code: 201, but got: 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
Verify that the POST Create API request with minimal dataset for different vaccine types
Verify that the GET method of Search API will be successful with all the valid parameters
Verify that the POST method of Search API will be successful with all the valid parameters
Flu event is created and search post request fetch the only one record matched with identifier and  elements with correct version id
Verify that the Update API will be fails if patient's date of birth has future or invalid formatted date

AssertionError: 
 Expected status code: 400, but got: 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
Verify that the POST Create API will fail if doseNumberPositiveInt is not valid
Verify that the POST Create API will fail if recorded has future or invalid formatted date
Verify that the POST Create API will fail if expiration date has invalid formatted date
Verify that Search API will throw error if NHS Number is invalid
